final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand named "LUMEA BEAUTY".

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine UI mockup; floral accents with purple flowers; soft lighting
Composition: three-column hero layout — left text column, center model, right product display; horizontal benefit cards at bottom
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and packaging box
Scene/backdrop: white and soft pink background with floral purple flower accents
Lighting/mood: soft, airy, bright
Color palette: soft pink and white primary palette with purple flower accents and gold accents
Materials/textures: floating white rounded rectangle stat cards with gold accents; pill-shaped feature badges; horizontal white rounded rectangle benefit cards with icons
Text (verbatim): Header logo: "LUMEA BEAUTY" | Navigation links: "特徴" / "成分" / "お客様の声" / "使い方" / "FAQ" | CTA button: "今すぐ試す" | Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" | Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" | Feature badges (pill-shaped with small icons): "敏感肌OK" / "高保湿" / "朝晩使える" | Bullet points (pink checkmarks): "美容成分をしっかり届ける" / "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ" / "続けやすいシンプルケア" | CTA buttons: "初回限定で試してみる >" / "成分をチェック >" | Trust badges: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし" | Stat cards (floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents): "満足度 96%" / "美容成分 5種配合" / "愛用者 12,000人突破" | Benefit cards (horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons): "うるおい" / "透明感" / "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; UI layout must be realistic and structured as a desktop landing page mockup
Avoid:
